title: metaxya lanosa
intro: Metaxya lanosa, also known as the "lanose water-fern," is a species of plant in the family Metaxyaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Metaxya lanosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a natural remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusing the leaves in water, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever and cough, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
